basic_details.job_title: Central University of Haryana Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Haryana Non Teaching Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 16 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Central University of Haryana Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 35 to 40 years who have qualifications such as Master’s Degree, Bachelor’s Degree, stenography and typing proficiency, and knowledge of computer applications with relevant experience are eligible to apply for these Non Teaching Posts vacancies.

age_limit.details: Public Relation Officer: 35 to 40 years Private Secretary: 35 to 40 years Personal Assistant: 35 to 40 years Age relaxation is applicable as per the Central University of Haryana Cadre Recruitment (Non-Teaching and other Academic Posts) Rules 2018.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree, Bachelor's Degree, Stenography Proficiency, Typing Proficiency, Computer Applications Knowledge, Relevant Experience
qualification.details: Public Relation Officer: Essential: Master's degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade B in UGC seven-point scale in Journalism and Mass Communication from recognized University/Institute OR Master's degree in any discipline with 55% marks and PG Diploma in Journalism and Mass Communication from recognized University/Institute AND Five years' experience in editorial department/centre of established English/Hindi Newspaper accredited with ABC, National News Agencies, Radio or Television, Film Media, reputed advertising agencies with excellent command of speaking in English and Hindi. Private Secretary: Essential: Bachelor's degree from recognized University/Institute; At least 02 years' experience as Personal Assistant or 5 years' experience as Stenographer and above in university/research establishment/Central/State Govt./PSU/other autonomous bodies; English/Hindi Stenography speed: 120 wpm English/100 wpm Hindi; Type-writing speed: 40 wpm English or 35 wpm Hindi on Computer; Knowledge of computer applications. Desirable: Proficiency in English & good communication skills. Personal Assistant: Essential: Bachelor's Degree from recognized University/Institute; Proficiency in Stenography in English/Hindi minimum 100 w.p.m.; Proficiency in Typing 40 wpm English or 35 wpm Hindi on computer; Knowledge of computer applications; At least two years' experience as Jr. Stenographer/Stenographer in Central/State Govt./University/Research institution/Autonomous organization. Desirable: Good knowledge of computer applications. Skill Test: Dictation 10 min @100 wpm, Transcription 40 min (English)/55 min (Hindi).

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Central University of Haryana Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Central University of Haryana to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central University of Haryana Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Various Non-Teaching posts is 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Various Non-Teaching posts released by the Central University of Haryana. These include positions like Public Relation Officer, Private Secretary, and Personal Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. Generally, candidates need a Master's Degree or Bachelor's Degree along with specific skills like stenography, typing, and computer knowledge, and relevant experience as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for most of the posts is between 35 to 40 years. Specific age limits and relaxation details are provided in the official notification for each post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these Non-Teaching posts ranges from Rs. 35,400/- to Rs. 56,100/- per month, depending on the specific post and the university's pay scale rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: For General and OBC candidates, the application fee is Rs. 1500/- for Group A posts and Rs. 800/- for Group B posts. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Central University of Haryana Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, Skill Test, Interview, and Document Verification. Candidates must clear all stages to be considered for the final selection.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the Central University of Haryana Cadre Recruitment (Non-Teaching and other Academic Posts) Rules 2018.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Haryana apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Haryana. However, it is advisable to check the official notification for specific domicile requirements or eligibility for candidates from other states.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link will be available on the Central University of Haryana's official website. These links are also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
